tools.name: system_get_volume
tools.description: Get the current system output volume level (0–100).

invoke.script:
set volInfo to get volume settings
return "Volume: " & (output volume of volInfo) as string

set volume output volume {{volume}}
return "Volume set to {{volume}}"

set volume with output muted
return "Audio muted"

set volume without output muted
return "Audio unmuted"

tools.name: system_toggle_dark_mode
tools.description: Toggle macOS dark mode on or off.

invoke.script:
tell application "System Events"
  tell appearance preferences
    set dark mode to not dark mode
    if dark mode then
      return "Dark mode enabled"
    else
      return "Dark mode disabled"
    end if
  end tell
end tell

tools.name: system_get_dark_mode
tools.description: Check whether macOS dark mode is currently enabled.

invoke.script:
tell application "System Events"
  tell appearance preferences
    if dark mode then
      return "Dark mode is ON"
    else
      return "Dark mode is OFF"
    end if
  end tell
end tell

display notification "{{body}}" with title "{{title}}" subtitle "{{subtitle}}"
return "Notification sent"

tools.name: system_get_clipboard
tools.description: Get the current contents of the system clipboard.

tools.name: system_set_clipboard
tools.description: Set the system clipboard to a given text value.

text.description: Text to copy to the clipboard

invoke.script:
set the clipboard to "{{text}}"
return "Copied to clipboard"

tools.name: system_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot and save it to the Desktop.

filename.description: Filename for the screenshot (e.g. screenshot.png). Saved to ~/Desktop.

invoke.script:
do shell script "screencapture -x ~/Desktop/{{filename}}"
return "Screenshot saved to ~/Desktop/{{filename}}"

tell application "System Events" to sleep
return "Sleeping"

tools.name: system_lock_screen
tools.description: Lock the Mac screen (requires password to unlock).

invoke.script:
tell application "System Events"
  keystroke "q" using {command down, control down}
end tell
return "Screen locked"

tools.name: system_get_frontmost_app
tools.description: Get the name of the application currently in the foreground.

invoke.script:
tell application "System Events"
  return name of first application process whose frontmost is true
end tell

tools.name: system_run_shortcut
tools.description: Run a macOS Shortcut by name.

shortcut_name.description: Exact name of the Shortcut in the Shortcuts app

invoke.script:
do shell script "shortcuts run " & quoted form of "{{shortcut_name}}"
return "Shortcut executed: {{shortcut_name}}"
